sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n95875" key="spermobole/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σπερμο-βολέω</orth>, <sense id="n95875.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">emit semen</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2052.tlg001:1:46" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Horap.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.46</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
